KeysToEntries.Mount_TrijiconAcogMount_Description: An intermediate piece used for mounting ACOG sights to Picatinny rails.
KeysToEntries.Mount_CzBren2SideWeaverRail_Description: <DEV>The CZ Bren 2 S Side Weaver Rails are designed to enhance the versatility of your CZ Bren 2 S firearm by providing secure attachment points for accessories. Each rail is made from durable materials and features a Weaver design, allowing for easy attachment of various tactical accessories such as lights, lasers, or grips. With these rails installed on the sides of your CZ Bren 2 S, you can customize your setup to suit your specific shooting style and preferences.
KeysToEntries.Mount_CzBren2LowerWeaverRail_Description: <DEV>The CZ Bren 2 S Side Weaver Rails are designed to enhance the versatility of your CZ Bren 2 S firearm by providing secure attachment points for accessories. Each rail is made from durable materials and features a Weaver design, allowing for easy attachment of various tactical accessories such as lights, lasers, or grips. With these rails installed on the sides of your CZ Bren 2 S, you can customize your setup to suit your specific shooting style and preferences.
KeysToEntries.Mount_AimpointMicroStandardMount_Descrip: A dedicated mounting solution designed for the popular Aimpoint Micro series optics. It provides a secure attachment for the optic to various firearm platforms, ensuring reliable performance.
KeysToEntries.Mount_HolosunHighMount_Description: A specialized mounting solution designed for Holosun optics. It allows for easy installation and secure attachment of the optic to various firearm platforms. The high-mount design raises the optic's position, providing a more comfortable and ergonomic shooting experience.
KeysToEntries.Mount_OriginalBp02AkAkmSideMount_Descrip: The BP-02 side mount is a quick-release mount with a weaver rail, and its lower part is compatible with AK and Saiga types. This rugged construction is made of aluminum alloy.
KeysToEntries.Mount_MosinNagantTriRailScopeMount_Descr: The MNT-MNTR01 offers tactical versatility for the Mosin-Nagant, featuring an extended top rail to accommodate various rifle scope positions, allowing seamless adjustment of eye relief.
KeysToEntries.Mount_SksRearSightPicatinnyRail_Descript: This mount is compatible with all SKS variants and features a low-profile design and an integral rear sight notch that provides backup iron sight with the optic removed.
KeysToEntries.Mount_VltorM14M1AClusterRail_Description: The CASV-14 is an extended upper handguard rail system for the M1A/M14. It provides a stable platform for mounting optics and accessories while maintaining a low overall weight. Designed to fit standard-contour barrels and most GI-style stocks, it extends back to the stripper clip guide, creating a continuous top rail.
KeysToEntries.Mount_M1A4thGenerationSteelScopeMount_De: A durable all-steel Weaver/Picatinny-style scope rail designed specifically for the M1A series.
KeysToEntries.Mount_ZenitcoB13Rail_Description: The B-13 rail can be installed on a regular dovetail joint on the receiver of AK platform rifles. It allows for the installation of sights on the rifle and creates a Picatinny rail over the weapon's receiver.
KeysToEntries.Mount_ZenitcoB13NRail_Description: The Zenitco B-13N Rail is a durable rail system designed for mounting accessories on firearms. It attaches above the receiver and provides a stable platform for scopes, sights, and other attachments.
KeysToEntries.Mount_ShockwaveQuadRailforM590_Descripti: This quad rail is designed to enhance the Mossberg 590 shotgun. Its durable construction provides a solid platform for attaching various tactical accessories while ensuring stability and accuracy during critical situations.
KeysToEntries.Mount_UtgMtMb590MossbergRail_Description: The UTG Mossberg 500/590 Scope Mount with Side Saddle Shell Holder and Picatinny Rail is made from a 6061-T6 matte black hard anodized aluminum construction. It is an ideal choice for quickly mounting optics and accessories on the 12-gauge Mossberg 500 and 590 tactical shotguns.
KeysToEntries.Mount_MossbergPicatinnyScopeRail_Descrip: This Picatinny/Scope mount for Mossberg shotguns allows for the attachment of various accessories, optics, and lights, enhancing their versatility and functionality.
KeysToEntries.Mount_AkMountRs_Description: The AK-303 side mount has a rail that extends above the receiver, allowing for the installation of optical devices.
KeysToEntries.Mount_ScalarworksLeap01_Description: A top-tier precision optic mount that delivers stability and repeatability. Constructed from advanced materials, the LEAP/01 is not only robust but also remarkably lightweight, minimizing additional weight on your firearm setup.
KeysToEntries.Mount_MLokRail3slot_Description: Designed to be compatible with all M-LOK-equipped handguards and forearms, the 3-slot M-LOK aluminum rail sections allow for mounting a variety of 1913 Picatinny specification accessories, including lights, vertical grips, and more.
KeysToEntries.Mount_MLokRail5slot_Description: A lightweight and durable 5-slot rail made from high-quality aluminum. Designed for use with all M-LOK compatible Hand Guards and Forends, this rail allows for easy attachment of various tactical accessories like grips and lights, providing enhanced customization options for your firearm.
KeysToEntries.Mount_MLokRail7slot_Description: A lightweight and durable 7-slot rail made from high-quality aluminum. Designed for use with all M-LOK compatible Hand Guards and Forends, this rail allows for easy attachment of various tactical accessories like grips and lights, providing enhanced customization options for your firearm.
KeysToEntries.Mount_MLokRail9slot_Description: Created for compatibility with any M-LOK-equipped hand guards and forends, the 9-slot M-LOK Aluminum Rail Sections enable the mounting of diverse accessories adhering to the 1913 Picatinny-Spec rail standard, including lights, vertical grips, and more.
KeysToEntries.Mount_30mmOring_Description: A simple and reliable mounting solution for attaching a 30mm diameter optic to a compatible firearm.
KeysToEntries.Mount_34mmOring_Description: Designed for attaching optics to modern AR-15 rifles, the Audere Precision Rifle Scope Mount is a top-quality mount specifically crafted for scopes with a 34mm tube diameter, ensuring precision and reliability. The mount is compatible with any 1913 or Picatinny rail, providing versatility and ease of use.
KeysToEntries.Mount_30mmOringLowProfile_Description: A compact and streamlined mounting option designed for attaching a 30mm diameter optic to a compatible firearm. With its low-profile design, it offers a closer alignment with the bore axis, resulting in improved cheek weld and target acquisition.
KeysToEntries.Mount_34mmOringLowProfile_Description: These scope rings are made of highly durable anodized aluminum, which makes them lightweight and able to withstand harsher treatment. For versatility and ease of use, the mount is compatible with any 1913 or NATO rail.
KeysToEntries.Mount_LightMountVBlockandRings_Descripti: A universal solution for attaching handheld lights to Magpul mounts. It is made from reinforced polymer and Mil-Spec anodized aluminum, and can accommodate lights with a body diameter of .75" to 1.04". Compatible with MOE Scout Mount, various M-LOK Cantilever and Offset Mounts, available in both aluminum and polymer.
KeysToEntries.Mount_Vz61TacticalMount_Description: This barrel mount is crafted for the Vz. 61 Skorpion and its civilian models. It includes dual Weaver/Picatinny rails and a threaded adapter for a flash suppressor, with an option for a sound suppressor. Designed for error-free installation, it's made of high-strength duralumin for a lasting performance.
KeysToEntries.Mount_BlackAcesTacticalPicatinnyQuadRail: Crafted from solid one-piece T6 6061 aluminum, the Black Aces Tactical Picatinny Quad Rail for Remington 870/1100 offers unmatched durability to withstand even the harshest conditions. This rail is designed to provide a secure and stable platform for mounting various accessories.
KeysToEntries.Mount_MesaTacticalPicatinnyRailRemington: This 20" rail allows for mounting a variety of optics, including those commonly used on AR-15 rifles. This setup enables the use of iron sights typically found on AR-15 platforms. Additionally, the Picatinny rail provides flexibility for mounting optics with varying degrees of eye relief, accommodating individual preferences and shooting styles.
KeysToEntries.Mount_Mp5G3LowProfileMount_Description: Known for its low profile compared to other HK scope mounts, this mount is compatible with firearms ranging from .22 to .308 caliber, making it suitable for a wide range of different platforms. Its universal design allows it to be flipped in either direction without obstructing the ejection port, ensuring unparalleled flexibility during use.
KeysToEntries.Mount_Mp5RingMount_Description: This mount improves the functionality of the MP5SD silencer by adding three Picatinny rails that allow users to attach additional equipment, such as optics, lights, or grips, to customize their setup to meet specific needs and preferences.
KeysToEntries.Mount_Glock17L2dCombatStrippedTyton17_De: The Glock 17 L2 Cover Stripe serves as a practical accessory designed to cover the mounting area for collimators. Its purpose is to provide a clean and streamlined appearance while effectively concealing the unused mounting space on the firearm.
KeysToEntries.Mount_Glock17ZevZ17CitadelStrippedSlide_: The Glock 17 Zev Z17 Citadel Cover Stripe serves as a covering accessory designed to conceal the mounting area for collimators. It seamlessly complements the aesthetics of the Zev Z17 Citadel slide design.
KeysToEntries.Mount_Glock17SteelCityArsenalP40Warhawk_: Inspired by World War II, this Glock 17 cover stripe features a captivating design that pays homage to the era. With a star at the top, it perfectly complements the overall P40 design theme. In addition, this striped cover effectively conceals the mounting area for collimators while maintaining the aesthetic integrity of the slide.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_SteinerDBAL-I2_Description: The Steiner DBAL-I2 (Dual Beam Aiming Laser) is a lightweight, military-grade laser aiming device designed for use in low-light and night vision environments. It features an infrared (IR) laser and an IR illuminator for long-range targeting up to 2,500 meters. The unit includes an adjustable windage and elevation system, a push-button switch, and a remote cable activation pad. The DBAL-I2 mounts to any Picatinny rail with a quick-release system and is waterproof up to five meters.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_SteinerDbalPl_Description: The Steiner DBAL-PL is a compact dual-laser aiming device designed for pistols. It offers both visible and infrared laser functions. With a bright white light, an IR illuminator, and multiple operational modes, it is ideal for tactical and low-light situations. The highly durable and lightweight DBAL-PL enables quick target acquisition in various environments and is suitable for law enforcement, military, and self-defense uses.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_ZenitcoKlesch1_Description: The Zenitco Klesch-1 flashlight is designed to identify and brightly illuminate targets during nighttime observation, inspection, and combat scenarios in low-visibility environments.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_SurefireP1RPeacekeeper_Descr: The P1R Peacekeeper Tactical is a SureFire rechargeable light designed for law enforcement professionals and anyone in need of a high-quality flashlight. Its advanced LED and precise reflector deliver a 600-lumen high-output beam with impressive reach and peripheral illumination.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_SteinerCqbl1_Description: The CQBL-1 is a compact, rugged, dual-function laser designed for close-quarters combat. It features co-aligned visible red and infrared aiming lasers, eliminating the need for separate sights.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_SurefireX300UA_Description: The Surefire X300U-A is a handgun flashlight that delivers 1,000 lumens of LED power. The precision TIR lens produces a powerful beam for close-to-medium-range engagements, while the ambidextrous switch and rugged aerospace aluminum body ensure effective threat identification and reliable performance in challenging conditions.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_SurefireX400UA_Description: This combination of white light/infrared LED and infrared laser features a Total Internal Reflection (TIR) lens with optically coated tempered glass, ensuring optimal light distribution and durability. The Class 1 infrared laser, with a peak output of less than 0.7mW, guarantees eye-safe performance, making it a versatile and secure tool for tactical applications.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_MawlC1_Description: The world's first commercially available NIR and visible green laser aiming device utilizing Class 1+ technology, delivering more infrared illumination output power than any FDA Class 3R or Class 1 laser currently on the market.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_AnPeq2_Description: A compact and versatile device that combines an infrared aiming laser with an illuminator. It offers customizable impact points and low-power options, allowing operators to fine-tune settings for precise targeting.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_NcStarCompactGreenLaser_Desc: The ncSTAR Green Laser is a sleek and powerful tactical accessory featuring a 532nm Class IIIa laser with a maximum output of less than 5mw. Its swift deployment is facilitated by a Weaver-style mount, while its fully adjustable windage and elevation features come complete with a handy adjustment tool. With an ambidextrous sliding on/off switch, this laser is both versatile and user-friendly. Constructed from robust aluminum with a stylish black anodized finish and powered by a CR2 lithium battery, it's a sophisticated and efficient tool for a variety of applications.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_NcStarLedFlashlight_Descript: A compact tactical flashlight with 150 lumens of peak output, featuring a quick-release mount compatible with most Weaver/Picatinny rails, ideal for full-sized semi-automatic pistols.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_ZenitcoRk0_Description: The RK-0 front grip can be installed on any handguard with a lower Picatinny rail or on the B-9 rail. It provides a convenient way to hold weapons while firing.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_ZenitcoRk1_Description: The RK-1 front grip is designed to be mounted on any handguard with a lower Picatinny rail or on the B-9 rail and is used to provide a more comfortable grip for the gun when firing.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_ZenitcoRk2_Description: The RK-2 front grip can be installed on any handguard with a lower Picatinny rail or on a B-9 rail. It provides a convenient way to hold weapons while firing.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_ZenitcoRk4_Description: The RK-4 front grip can be installed on any handguard with a lower Picatinny rail or on the B-9 rail. It provides a convenient way to hold weapons while firing.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_ZenitcoRk5_Description: The RK-5 front grip is designed to be installed on handguards with a lower Picatinny rail, or on the B-9 and B-9M rails, and is used to provide a comfortable grip on the weapon when firing.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_ZenitcoRk6_Description: The RK-6 hand stopper is designed to be installed on any handguard with a lower Picatinny rail or on the B-9 rail and is used to provide a more comfortable grip on the weapon when firing.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_MagpulMLokAfg_Description: The Magpul M-LOK AFG (Angled Fore Grip) is a refinement of the original AFG and AFG-2. While weighing only 1.2 ounces (34 g), including hardware, the Magpul M-LOK AFG is a surprisingly high-strength grip.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_MagpulAfg2_Description: The Magpul AFG-2 is a highly ergonomic, angled foregrip designed to enhance weapon control and handling. It features a compact and low-profile design, allowing for a comfortable grip and natural hand placement on the firearm.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_UtgProMLokHandstop_Description: The UTG Pro M-LOK Handstop is a compact accessory designed for M-LOK-compatible handguards. It serves as a hand stop to prevent the shooter's hand from sliding too far forward on the firearm.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_UtgUltraSlimAngeled_Description: The UTG lightweight front tactical grip for M-lok forends is made from aircraft-grade aluminum, making it both durable and easy to handle. Its textured surface provides a secure grip in challenging conditions or when wearing gloves, improving weapon control.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_UtgUltraSlimMLokMtFgm01X_Descri: The UTG Ultra Slim M-LOK MT-FGM01X Foregrip is a lightweight and sleek foregrip that is designed for M-LOK-compatible handguards. Its slim profile enhances maneuverability and provides a streamlined appearance.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_ShiftVertical_Description: The SHIFT Vertical Foregrip is a versatile accessory that is compatible with Picatinny rail systems and is designed to enhance gun control and stability. Its ergonomic design and textured surface provide a comfortable and secure grip, allowing for improved handling during firearm operation.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_DanielDefenceVertical_Descripti: Crafted by Daniel Defense, this vertical foregrip is a reliable and durable accessory that optimizes weapon control and handling. It ensures exceptional quality and compatibility with Picatinny rail systems.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_MagpulRvg_Description: The Magpul RVG (Rail Vertical Grip) is a lightweight and versatile vertical foregrip designed for increased weapon control. It attaches securely to any Picatinny rail system, providing a stable and ergonomic gripping surface. It has also been optimized for use with the "thumb break method" of shooting.
KeysToEntries.Mount_MdtPremiumScopeRings_Description: The MDT 30mm Premier Scope Rings are high-quality, robust, and lightweight. These rings are designed to withstand harsh conditions with a sturdy construction that ensures the scope remains securely mounted.
KeysToEntries.Mount_GlockMicroMount_Description: This mount is designed for Glock pistols and connects directly to the slide. It's designed specifically for first-generation Micro Series sights like the Micro T-1/H-1 to ensure a perfect fit.
KeysToEntries.Mount_HolosunLowMount_Description: A specialized mounting solution designed for Holosun optics. It allows for easy installation and secure attachment of the optic to various firearm platforms. With its low-profile design, the mount positions the optic closer to the bore axis, resulting in improved sight alignment and reduced sight-over-bore offset.
KeysToEntries.Mount_KochetovringsforPu3522_Description: Steel base rings for the PU 3.5x22 scope.
KeysToEntries.Mount_MosinKochetovMount_Description: This side base is an exact replica of the design used during WW2 for the Mosin-Nagant rifle. It provides a sturdy foundation and remains faithful to the historical design. However, installation requires the expertise of a gunsmith to ensure proper fitting and functionality.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_SurefireM600IbScoutlight_Des: The M600AA-DSS Scout Light features a rugged, recoil-proof design that houses a powerful LED that, when channeled through a special TIR lens, produces a high-intensity 200-lumen beam. This beam provides significant range and peripheral illumination, making it well-suited for close-to-medium range applications.
KeysToEntries.Mount_M700PicatinnyRail_Description: These MIL-STD 1913 Picatinny Rails are lightweight and designed to mount directly onto the flattop receiver of short-action firearms.
KeysToEntries.Mount_ModXRail_Description: A precision-engineered Scope Rail designed for the AB Arms MOD*X Chassis. It is made from 6061-T6 aluminum and has been Mil-Spec Type III hard coat anodized for added durability.
KeysToEntries.Mount_KeyModRail5slot_Description: Constructed from high-quality 6061-T6 aluminum and finished with a Mil-Spec anodized coating, this rail is designed specifically for KeyMod handguard rail systems. It features bottom protrusions for added stability and a built-in 1913 Mil-Spec Picatinny rail for versatile attachment mounting. The curved edge design provides protection against scratches and hand injuries.
KeysToEntries.Mount_KeyModRail7slot_Description: Constructed from high-quality 6061-T6 aluminum and finished with a Mil-Spec anodized coating, this rail is designed specifically for KeyMod handguard rail systems. It features bottom protrusions for added stability and a built-in 1913 Mil-Spec Picatinny rail for versatile attachment mounting. The curved edge design provides protection against scratches and hand injuries.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_SteinerAnPeq15ADbalA2_Descri: A military-grade dual-beam aiming laser combined with an IR laser and an illuminator. It is designed for precision in low light or night conditions with adjustable windage/elevation, high/low power modes, and an integrated push-button switch. It mounts to Picatinny rails with a quick-release HT mount and offers a range of up to 2500 meters with the IR laser.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_ZenitcoPerst4_Description: The Zenitco PERST-4 Gen 4.1 is a combined aiming device designed for improved target acquisition in various lighting conditions. Built with durable materials, it provides visible and infrared laser functionality, making it versatile for day and night operations.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_AdeAdvancedRedLaser_Descript: The ADE Advanced Red Laser is the brightest red laser allowed by law. With a modern accessory rail, the laser sight fits virtually any firearm.
KeysToEntries.Mount_Glock17VortexViper_Description: The VORTEX VIPER Red Dot Mount adapter is a high-quality red dot mount plate for Glock pistols.
KeysToEntries.Mount_Glock17Holosun507c_Description: The Holosun 507c Adapter allows for secure attachment of the Holosun 507c red dot sight to Glock pistols. It is made of durable materials to ensure a stable mount, offering reliable performance for improved targeting.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_DanielDefenceVerticalBlack_Desc: Crafted by Daniel Defense, this vertical foregrip is a reliable and durable accessory that optimizes weapon control and handling. It ensures exceptional quality and compatibility with Picatinny rail systems.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_MagpulAfg2FDE_Description: The Magpul AFG-2 is a highly ergonomic, angled foregrip designed to enhance weapon control and handling. It features a compact and low-profile design, allowing for a comfortable grip and natural hand placement on the firearm.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_MagpulRvgFDE_Description: The Magpul RVG (Rail Vertical Grip) is a lightweight and versatile vertical foregrip designed for increased weapon control. It attaches securely to any Picatinny rail system, providing a stable and ergonomic gripping surface. It has also been optimized for use with the "thumb break method" of shooting.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_MagpulMLokAfgFDE_Description: The Magpul M-LOK AFG (Angled Fore Grip) is a refinement of the original AFG and AFG-2. While weighing only 1.2 ounces (34 g), including hardware, the Magpul M-LOK AFG is a surprisingly high-strength grip.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_DanielDefenceVerticalMilSpec_De: Crafted by Daniel Defense, this vertical foregrip is a reliable and durable accessory that optimizes weapon control and handling. It ensures exceptional quality and compatibility with Picatinny rail systems.
KeysToEntries.Mount_SksKodiakDefenceRail_Description: This Advanced Rail System is machined from a single block of high-quality 6061-T6 aircraft-grade aluminum for durability and reliability. Its Mil-Spec Type III hard black anodized finish enhances resistance to wear and tear. It also includes an integrated shell deflector to prevent malfunctions and protect optics from potential damage.
KeysToEntries.Mount_1911GripScopeMount_Description: A versatile accessory designed for the Government Model 1911 pistol. This black grip mount allows for the easy attachment of a scope, improving target acquisition and accuracy.
KeysToEntries.Mount_VortexHighMount_Description: The Vortex High Mount provides an elevated position for the optics, making it ideal for maintaining a natural shooting position and providing a clear line of sight over obstacles or when using iron sights. It's commonly used on rifles with flat-top receivers, ensuring compatibility with various scopes and red dots.
KeysToEntries.Mount_VortexLowMount_Description: The Vortex Low Mount keeps optics closer to the barrel for a compact, streamlined setup. Ideal for shotguns, submachine guns, or applications where a lower sight height is preferred.
KeysToEntries.Mount_VortexSpitfire5x_Description: This is a small protective mount cover for the Vortex Spitfire collimator mount. It protects the mount when no collimator is attached.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_ZenitcoKlesch2_Description: The Zenitco 2P Klesch is a tactical LED flashlight designed for firearm mounting. With 270 lumens of brightness, it effectively illuminates targets up to 200 meters away. Made from durable aluminum, it runs on two CR123 batteries, offering up to 3 hours of continuous use at maximum brightness.
KeysToEntries.Mount_Bm1AkmAccessoryMount_Description: This mount is designed for AKM-type barrels and allows for the attachment of lights, lasers, or other accessories. It's constructed of durable 6061-T6 aluminum with a black anodized finish and features two sturdy clamps for a secure fit.
KeysToEntries.Mount_LeapAcroMount_Description: The Scalarworks LEAP/03 is an ultra-light, quick-release mount for magnified optics, designed for superior rigidity and tool-free adjustment. Its rugged construction ensures durability, while the fast attachment and removal make it ideal for precision marksmanship and tactical use.
KeysToEntries.Mount_AcroPicatinnyMount_Description: The Aimpoint Acro Mount is a precision-machined, durable mount for securely attaching Acro Series red dot sights to Weaver or Picatinny rails. It offers a stable, low-profile installation with quick and easy attachment, making it ideal for tactical and sport shooting.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_A3Tactical_Description: The A3 Tactical M-LOK Modular Vertical Foregrip is a versatile accessory designed to enhance firearm control and customization. Its modular design allows users to configure it as a vertical grip, handstop, or angled grip, adapting to various shooting styles. Constructed from high-quality materials, it ensures durability while maintaining a lightweight profile. The M-LOK compatibility facilitates easy attachment to M-LOK handguards, providing a secure fit.
KeysToEntries.Mount_SksBarrelPicatinnyMount_Descriptio: Constructed from durable aluminum alloy and steel with a matte black finish, this mount features a 1-inch Weaver rail with a single crosscut and clamps securely to the barrel with four hex screws.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_AT3Tactical_Description: The AT3 AR-15 M-LOK Angled Foregrip enhances weapon control and accuracy by positioning the shooter's hand high on the bore's centerline, aiding in recoil mitigation for faster follow-up shots. Its ergonomic, low-profile design serves as a comfortable index point and forward stop, preventing the hand from reaching the hot front sight or muzzle.
KeysToEntries.Mount_Glock17RearSightAcroMount_Descript: The Aimpoint Glock ACRO Mount Plate allows for secure mounting of Aimpoint ACRO sights on Glock handguns.
KeysToEntries.M14x1 RH Male to M14x1 LH Female_Descrip: This mount is designed for AKM-type barrels and allows for the attachment of lights, lasers, or other accessories. It's constructed of durable 6061-T6 aluminum with a black anodized finish and features two sturdy clamps for a secure fit.
KeysToEntries.Mount_34mmOringLowProfileCAMO_Descriptio: These scope rings are made of highly durable anodized aluminum, which makes them lightweight and able to withstand harsher treatment. For versatility and ease of use, the mount is compatible with any 1913 or NATO rail.
KeysToEntries.Mount_ShockwaveQuadRailforM590CAMO_Descr: This quad rail is designed to enhance the Mossberg 590 shotgun. Its durable construction provides a solid platform for attaching various tactical accessories while ensuring stability and accuracy during critical situations.
KeysToEntries.Mount_M700PicatinnyRailCamo_Description: These MIL-STD 1913 Picatinny Rails are lightweight and designed to mount directly onto the flattop receiver of short-action firearms.
KeysToEntries.Mount_30mmOringCamo_Description: A simple and reliable mounting solution for attaching a 30mm diameter optic to a compatible firearm.
KeysToEntries.Mount_30mmOringCamoAR_Description: A simple and reliable mounting solution for attaching a 30mm diameter optic to a compatible firearm.
KeysToEntries.Mount_34mmOringCAMO_Description: Designed for attaching optics to modern AR-15 rifles, the Audere Precision Rifle Scope Mount is a top-quality mount specifically crafted for scopes with a 34mm tube diameter, ensuring precision and reliability. The mount is compatible with any 1913 or Picatinny rail, providing versatility and ease of use.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_MagpulRvgCAMO_Description: The Magpul RVG (Rail Vertical Grip) is a lightweight and versatile vertical foregrip designed for increased weapon control. It attaches securely to any Picatinny rail system, providing a stable and ergonomic gripping surface. It has also been optimized for use with the "thumb break method" of shooting.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_MagpulAfg2FDECAMO_Description: The Magpul AFG-2 is a highly ergonomic, angled foregrip designed to enhance weapon control and handling. It features a compact and low-profile design, allowing for a comfortable grip and natural hand placement on the firearm.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_MagpulAfg2CAMO_Description: The Magpul AFG-2 is a highly ergonomic, angled foregrip designed to enhance weapon control and handling. It features a compact and low-profile design, allowing for a comfortable grip and natural hand placement on the firearm.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_MagpulMLokAfgCAMO_Description: The Magpul M-LOK AFG (Angled Fore Grip) is a refinement of the original AFG and AFG-2. While weighing only 1.2 ounces (34 g), including hardware, the Magpul M-LOK AFG is a surprisingly high-strength grip.
KeysToEntries.Mount_30mmOring_M700_DST_V1_Description: A simple and reliable mounting solution for attaching a 30mm diameter optic to a compatible firearm.
KeysToEntries.Mount_AUS34mmOring_Description: The AUS Mount is a one-piece, 7075-T6 aluminum scope mount designed for 34mm optics. It attaches to Picatinny rails using a low-profile, spring-loaded steel clamp that can be tightened with either a hex or flathead screwdriver. It is finished with MIL-STD Type III hard anodizing.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_MagpulRvgSC_Description: The Magpul RVG (Rail Vertical Grip) is a lightweight and versatile vertical foregrip designed for increased weapon control. It attaches securely to any Picatinny rail system, providing a stable and ergonomic gripping surface. It has also been optimized for use with the "thumb break method" of shooting.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_MagpulAfg2PL_Description: The Magpul AFG-2 is a highly ergonomic, angled foregrip designed to enhance weapon control and handling. It features a compact and low-profile design, allowing for a comfortable grip and natural hand placement on the firearm.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_MagpulAfg2HT_Description: The Magpul AFG-2 is a highly ergonomic, angled foregrip designed to enhance weapon control and handling. It features a compact and low-profile design, allowing for a comfortable grip and natural hand placement on the firearm.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_MagpulMLokAfgJC_Description: The Magpul M-LOK AFG (Angled Fore Grip) is a refinement of the original AFG and AFG-2. While weighing only 1.2 ounces (34 g), including hardware, the Magpul M-LOK AFG is a surprisingly high-strength grip.
KeysToEntries.Mount_34mmOringLowProfileSW_Description: These scope rings are made of highly durable anodized aluminum, which makes them lightweight and able to withstand harsher treatment. For versatility and ease of use, the mount is compatible with any 1913 or NATO rail.
KeysToEntries.Mount_ShockwaveQuadRailforM590RT_Descrip: This quad rail is designed to enhance the Mossberg 590 shotgun. Its durable construction provides a solid platform for attaching various tactical accessories while ensuring stability and accuracy during critical situations.
KeysToEntries.Mount_M700PicatinnyRailGC_Description: These MIL-STD 1913 Picatinny Rails are lightweight and designed to mount directly onto the flattop receiver of short-action firearms.
KeysToEntries.Mount_30mmOringCamoPL_Description: A simple and reliable mounting solution for attaching a 30mm diameter optic to a compatible firearm.
KeysToEntries.Mount_34mmOringHT_Description: Designed for attaching optics to modern AR-15 rifles, the Audere Precision Rifle Scope Mount is a top-quality mount specifically crafted for scopes with a 34mm tube diameter, ensuring precision and reliability. The mount is compatible with any 1913 or Picatinny rail, providing versatility and ease of use.
KeysToEntries.Mount_LeapAcroMountGN_Description: The Scalarworks LEAP/03 is an ultra-light, quick-release mount for magnified optics, designed for superior rigidity and tool-free adjustment. Its rugged construction ensures durability, while the fast attachment and removal make it ideal for precision marksmanship and tactical use.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_SurefireM600IbScoutlightGN_D: The M600AA-DSS Scout Light features a rugged, recoil-proof design that houses a powerful LED that, when channeled through a special TIR lens, produces a high-intensity 200-lumen beam. This beam provides significant range and peripheral illumination, making it well-suited for close-to-medium range applications.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_SteinerCqbl1GN_Description: The CQBL-1 is a compact, rugged, dual-function laser designed for close-quarters combat. It features co-aligned visible red and infrared aiming lasers, eliminating the need for separate sights.
KeysToEntries.Mount_30mmOringGC_Description: A simple and reliable mounting solution for attaching a 30mm diameter optic to a compatible firearm.
KeysToEntries.Mount_M1AScoutScopeMount_Description: This sleek, low-profile Picatinny rail is made from durable 6061-T6 billet aluminum and is designed for the M1A Scout Squad and SOCOM-16 models.
KeysToEntries.Mount_M1AEBRScopeMount_Description: This aluminum Picatinny rail is designed for Sage/EBR-style Enhanced Battle Rifle (EBR) stocks. Machined from a single solid piece, it’s lightweight and features a hard-coat anodized finish for durable, long-lasting use.
KeysToEntries.Mount_30mmOringPL_Description: A simple and reliable mounting solution for attaching a 30mm diameter optic to a compatible firearm.
KeysToEntries.Mount_AlienRetroMount_Description: The Retro Optic Mount is a universal optic plate designed for use with the Retro and Limited Optics upgrade kits. It attaches directly to the Retro slide, providing a stable platform for mounting red dot sights and enhancing target acquisition.
KeysToEntries.Mount_Remington788PicatinnyRail_Descript: A one-piece Picatinny rail designed for the Remington 788. Precision-machined from lightweight aluminum, it provides a stable base for mounting optics. Its simple, durable design is essential for transforming the 788 into a reliable scoped hunting rifle.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_OlightOdin_Description: The Olight Odin Series is a rugged, high performance tactical flashlight designed specifically for weapon mounting via innovative Picatinny rail attachments. Known for their high lumen output, long beam distance and durable construction.
KeysToEntries.Mount_TrijiconMROLowRail_Mount_Name: Trijicon MRO Low Picatinny Rail Mount
KeysToEntries.Mount_TrijiconMROLowRail_Mount_Descripti: The Trijicon AC32067 MRO Low Mount Adapter is a sleek, durable Picatinny/Weaver rail mount designed specifically for the Trijicon MRO reflex sight. It is made from high-quality aluminum with a hardcoat anodized finish.
KeysToEntries.Mount_TrijiconLowRail_Mount_Description: This compact adapter is constructed from 7075-T6 aluminum with a hardcoat anodized finish. It is designed specifically for attaching Trijicon RMR reflex sights to any MIL-STD-1913 Picatinny or Weaver rail.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_ZenitcoPerst4HT_Description: The Zenitco PERST-4 Gen 4.1 is a combined aiming device designed for improved target acquisition in various lighting conditions. Built with durable materials, it provides visible and infrared laser functionality, making it versatile for day and night operations.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_SurefireX300UAHT_Description: The Surefire X300U-A is a handgun flashlight that delivers 1,000 lumens of LED power. The precision TIR lens produces a powerful beam for close-to-medium-range engagements, while the ambidextrous switch and rugged aerospace aluminum body ensure effective threat identification and reliable performance in challenging conditions.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_SurefireX400UAHT_Description: This combination of white light/infrared LED and infrared laser features a Total Internal Reflection (TIR) lens with optically coated tempered glass, ensuring optimal light distribution and durability. The Class 1 infrared laser, with a peak output of less than 0.7mW, guarantees eye-safe performance, making it a versatile and secure tool for tactical applications.
KeysToEntries.Mount_AlienToprailIron_Description: The Alien slide is a compact, lightweight internal component that cycles beneath the fixed top rail. It contains the firing mechanism and operates in conjunction with the gas-delayed blowback system. Unlike traditional full-length slides, its low-mass design reduces reciprocating weight, delivering smoother recoil, quicker cycling, and greater shot-to-shot control.
KeysToEntries.Mount_AlienToprailOptic_Description: The Alien Optic-Ready Top Rail (Standard or Match) is a fixed, non-reciprocating module that mounts directly to the frame and barrel assembly. It supports RMS, RTS2, C-MORE RTS, and Trijicon RMRcc footprint optics via adapter plates, remaining completely independent of the slide’s movement. Because it is stationary and barrel-locked, the optic holds zero with absolute stability and never shifts under recoil.
KeysToEntries.Mount_AlienToprailRetro_Description: The Alien Creator Retro Top Rail – Match converts the pistol to a slide-mounted optic setup while maintaining a trigger feel optimized for Limited Optics competition.
KeysToEntries.Mount_STSMagnifierMount_Description: A tactical side-swing mount designed for rapid target transitions. It allows for an instant switch between magnified and unmagnified views while retaining zero. Precision-machined from aluminum, it can handle recoil and is compatible with G30, G33, G43, and G45 magnifiers. It is the standard mount for EOTECH optics.
KeysToEntries.Mount_UnityFastFTC30mmMount_Description: A compact, flip-to-center magnifier mount that stows the optic below the sight plane for snag-free carrying and instant deployment. It features a force-to-overcome mechanism and can be mounted for left- or right-handed use. It fits most 30mm magnifiers with a 30mm ring interface.
KeysToEntries.Mount_UnityFastFTC30mmMountFDE_Descripti: A compact, flip-to-center magnifier mount that stows the optic below the sight plane for snag-free carrying and instant deployment. It features a force-to-overcome mechanism and can be mounted for left- or right-handed use. It fits most 30mm magnifiers with a 30mm ring interface.
KeysToEntries.Mount_UnityFastFTCOMNIMount_Description: An advanced flip-to-center magnifier mount that positions the optic below the sight line when stowed, thereby eliminating side swing and the risk of snagging. It employs a force-to-overcome action.
KeysToEntries.Mount_UnityFastFTCOMNIMountFDE_Descripti: An advanced flip-to-center magnifier mount that positions the optic below the sight line when stowed, thereby eliminating side swing and the risk of snagging. It employs a force-to-overcome action.
KeysToEntries.Mount_UnityFastMicroMount_Description: A compact red-dot mount with built-in backup iron sights. It keeps the rail clear while preserving capability.
KeysToEntries.Mount_UnityFastMicroMountFDE_Description: A compact red-dot mount with built-in backup iron sights. It keeps the rail clear while preserving capability.
KeysToEntries.Mount_UnityFastOpticRiserMount_Descripti: A low-profile riser that raises the lower third of co-witness optics to a 2.26-inch optical centerline.
KeysToEntries.Mount_UnityFastOpticRiserMountFDE_Descri: A low-profile riser that raises the lower third of co-witness optics to a 2.26-inch optical centerline.
KeysToEntries.Mount_MagnifierFlipMount_Description: A quick-flip mount that swings the magnifier in or out of the optical path on demand. It is built for 30mm tubes and has a low baseline height of 38.5mm.
KeysToEntries.Mount_MagnifierFlipMountHigh_Description: A quick-flip mount that allows for instant swinging of the magnifier in and out of the optical axis. It fits 39mm tubes and is optimized for the AR-15/M4.
KeysToEntries.Mount_RailOffsetMount_Description: An offset adapter that attaches to a Picatinny rail and offers a short 45-degree angled rail for a red dot sight.
KeysToEntries.Mount_KeyModRail7slotSW_Description: Constructed from high-quality 6061-T6 aluminum and finished with a Mil-Spec anodized coating, this rail is designed specifically for KeyMod handguard rail systems. It features bottom protrusions for added stability and a built-in 1913 Mil-Spec Picatinny rail for versatile attachment mounting. The curved edge design provides protection against scratches and hand injuries.
KeysToEntries.Mount_CarryHandlePicatinnyMount_Descript: This Picatinny rail is designed to fit A1/A2 fixed or MIL-SPEC detachable AR-15/M4/M16 carry handles. Made from durable, black, anodized aluminum, it includes a thumb nut for quick, tool-free installation. The see-through channel allows for continued use of iron sights, even when optics are mounted.
KeysToEntries.TacticalDev_ZenitcoPerst4SW_Description: The Zenitco PERST-4 Gen 4.1 is a combined aiming device designed for improved target acquisition in various lighting conditions. Built with durable materials, it provides visible and infrared laser functionality, making it versatile for day and night operations.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_ZenitcoRk4SW_Description: The RK-4 front grip can be installed on any handguard with a lower Picatinny rail or on the B-9 rail. It provides a convenient way to hold weapons while firing.
KeysToEntries.Mount_M1AEBRScopeMountBH_Name: M1A EBR Aluminium Scope Mount (Black Hawk)
KeysToEntries.Mount_M1AEBRScopeMountBH_Description: This aluminum Picatinny rail is designed for Sage/EBR-style Enhanced Battle Rifle (EBR) stocks. Machined from a single solid piece, it’s lightweight and features a hard-coat anodized finish for durable, long-lasting use.
KeysToEntries.Mount_1911VortexMount_Description: The Sight Mount for 1911 with Adjustable Sights facilitates the installation of red-dot optics without requiring permanent firearm modifications. This mount replaces the rear sight, providing a stable base for the optic while retaining the option to revert to the original sight setup.
KeysToEntries.Mount_1911TrijiconMount_Description: The Trijicon RMRcc Pistol Dovetail Mount is a steel mounting solution designed for Kimber 1911 and Ultra Carry pistols. It is intended to replace the rear sight and securely attach the Trijicon RMRcc red dot sight.
KeysToEntries.Mount_1inchOringHigh_Description: A two-piece scope mount for 1″ main tubes. Machined from lightweight, anodized aluminum, it clamps with steel cross-bolt rings and fasteners for a secure hold without the weight of steel mounts.
KeysToEntries.Mount_BayonetLugAccessoryMount_Descripti: An accessory rail that clamps over a rifle’s bayonet lug to add a forward mounting point for lights, lasers, and other accessories.
KeysToEntries.Foregrip_SteyrAug_Description: <DEV>A rugged, ergonomic vertical foregrip designed for the AUG’s unique forend, improving weapon control during rapid fire and tight maneuvers. Textured surface and secure attachment reduce muzzle climb and enhance handling in close-quarters and dynamic engagements.
